summary: Offline-only review packet for public PP&D source refresh candidates.
seed_review_references: PP&D plan official source anchors verified 2026-05-08
public refresh seed review queue placeholder
official_source_anchor_placeholder: Reviewer must confirm each candidate remains one of the official public source anchors or a linked PP&D public reference.
request_method_expectations: Synthetic request rows are GET-only and include no body.
rate_limit_notes: Any later approved run must use conservative PP&D-local pacing and stop on policy or robots uncertainty.
metadata_only_archive_manifest_expectati: Archive manifest rows may contain URL, status placeholder, content type placeholder, hash placeholder, processor reference, and normalized document placeholder only.
skip_reason_expectations: Skipped rows must use explicit reason codes such as outside allowlist, unsupported scheme, policy hold, robots hold, private-auth boundary, size hold, or unsupported content type.
freshness_monitor_update_placeholder: Freshness monitor update is deferred pending reviewer approval.
rollback_notes: Rejecting this packet leaves existing public corpus, prompts, guardrails, release state, and scheduler state unchanged.

candidate_preflight_rows.official_source_anchor_placeholder: Reviewer must confirm this URL is still the PP&D online permitting tools overview before any processor handoff.
seed_review_references: PP&D plan official source anchors verified 2026-05-08
candidate_preflight_rows.allow_reason: official public PP&D guide on allowlisted host
candidate_preflight_rows.robots_decision_placeholder: Reviewer must record robots result before processor handoff.
candidate_preflight_rows.allowlist_decision_placeholder: Reviewer must record host allowlist and PP&D policy decision before processor handoff.
candidate_preflight_rows.canonical_url_expectation: Canonical URL remains the public wetten.overheid.nl PP&D online permitting tools overview.
candidate_preflight_rows.rate_limit_note: Later approved metadata capture must use one-at-a-time conservative pacing and stop on errors.
candidate_preflight_rows.raw_body_persistence_exclusion_check: Source bodies are not retained in committed artifacts.
candidate_preflight_rows.download_exclusion_check: Document retrieval is out of scope for this preflight packet.
candidate_preflight_rows.metadata_only_capture_placeholder: Capture URL, status placeholder, hash placeholder, MIME placeholder, and citation metadata only.
candidate_preflight_rows.metadata_only_archive_manifest_expectati: Archive manifest placeholder excludes source body content and local artifact paths.
candidate_preflight_rows.skip_reason_expectation: If held, row must record a public preflight skip reason before removal from the candidate queue.
candidate_preflight_rows.freshness_monitor_update_placeholder: Freshness monitor update is deferred until reviewer approval.
candidate_preflight_rows.rollback_note: Rejecting this row leaves current public source records unchanged.

synthetic_request_rows.rate_limit_note: Synthetic row documents conservative pacing only; no network request is made by this fixture.
